## Checklist

- [ ] Uses a branch name such as `feature/house-publish`, `feature/search`, or `feature/ai-recommend`.
- [ ] Keeps the PR atomic and close to 300 changed lines or less.
- [ ] Explains any exception, such as conflict resolution or generated lock/checksum files.
- [ ] Includes a clear PR title and body before review.
